sentences: {"product_title": "Homax 15 lb. Dry Mix Wall Texture", "product_description": "Create a variety of textured finishes for your interior walls with this Homax Products Inc. 15 lb. {"product_title": "Homax 2-gal. White Sand Roll-On Texture Decorative Wall Finish", "product_description": "Homax Sand Roll-On Texture is a ready-to-use, easy-to-apply, low odor, paintable finish for interior walls and ceilings. It is ideal to refresh surfaces, or to create a distinct decorative effect to beautify your home. Homax Sand Roll-On Texture contains a lightweight perlite aggregate that emulates an old world plaster look. The creative possibilities with these Homax Sand Roll-On textures are unlimited. Enhance your home by adding depth and dimension with unique texture patterns that reflect your personality and completes your home's decor. Simply apply using a heavy nap paint roller, paint brush, or trowel. For added effects use a texture roller, comb, sponge, whisk broom, broad knife or other household items to create your own unique look.Ready-to-use roll-on decorative wall finishIdeal to refresh surfaces or create a decorative old world plaster lookAdd depth and dimension with unique texture patternsCreate unique texture effectsHide surface imperfectionsPaintableLow odorFor interior walls and ceilingsSandTwo (2) gallon tub", "Bullet01": "Ready-to-use roll-on decorative wall finish", "Bullet02": "Ideal to refresh surfaces or create a decorative \u201cold world plaster\u201d look", "Bullet03": "Add depth and dimension with unique texture patterns", "Bullet04": "Create unique texture effects", "Bullet05": "Hide surface imperfections", "Bullet06": "Paintable", "Bullet07": "Low odor", "Bullet08": "For interior walls and ceilings", "Bullet09": "Sand", "Bullet10": "Two (2) gallon tub", "MFG Brand Name": "Homax", "Paint Product Type": "Plaster, Stucco and Textured Surface Repair", "Patching & Repair Product Type": "Spackling Paste", "Product Depth (in.)": "9.5", "Product Height (in.)": "9.75", "Product Weight (lb.)": "26", "Product Width (in.)": "9.5"}

{"product_title": "Ryobi 155 mph 300 CFM 40-Volt Lithium-Ion Cordless Jet Fan Blower - Battery and Charger Not Included", "product_description": "The unique jet fan design of the Ryobi cordless blower optimizes air flow to produce Gas-Like Power at 155 mph and 300 CFM. The cordless jet fan blower blasts through wet and dry leaves and debris and is ideal for lawns and hard surfaces. Other product features include a variable speed trigger for air speed control and an overall sleek design with a soft grip handle for user comfort. It starts quickly and easily, without the hassle of gas and oil. {"product_title": "SharkBite 3/4 in. Brass PEX Barb x Female Pipe Thread Adapter 90-Degree Drop-Ear Elbow", "product_description": "The SharkBite PEX Barb x Female NPT Drop-Ear Elbow is an easy to install, low cost solution to connect PEX Tubing. SharkBite PEX Barb fittings are compatible for potable water distribution and hydronic heating applications. These PEX fittings may be used with the stainless steel clamping system or the copper crimp ring system (both sold separately). {"product_title": "1/2 in. x 100 ft. PEX Pipe in Blue", "product_description": "SharkBite PEX is a cross-linked polyethylene tubing best suited for potable water supply application.
